cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is about figuring out between what times Richard could have gone to the bakery. The key here is to look at all the times Richard was seen doing other things and find the gaps where he wasn't doing those activities. The bakery is closed after 7pm, so he must have gone before that. First, let me list out all the known times Richard was occupied: - Richard woke up at 8am. So he wasn't asleep before 8am. - Betty saw him at the library from 9am to 2pm.
